title: strychnos dschurica
intro: Strychnos dschurica, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Loganiaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos dschurica include its ability to relieve pain and reduce fever, as well as its potential to treat various infections and diseases such as malaria and intestinal worms. Herbal preparations of Strychnos dschurica often include the leaves, bark, and roots of the plant, which can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
